full_text:
Cheng Qi (Gonghong) 程祁 (公弘)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Qi (程祁), styledGonghong (公弘), was born in Ba. Son of Cheng Ji. Yang Xi regarded him as very talented. Died at 19. Cheng Qi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
